REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE 12/14/22,SC-100 MAIL TO ERIK CARDENAS(ENVOLOPE MARKED:ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN UNABLE TO FORWARD)
ORDER RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED**PLAINTIFF

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-17-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-17-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF VANESSA VALENTINO IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT ERIK CARDENAS IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF ORALLY STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGEPROTEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-17-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALENTINO, VANESSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARDENAS, ERIK $6,475.00 PRINCIPAL, $647.50 INTEREST, $156.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,278.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY VALENTINO, VANESSA AS TO DEFENDANT CARDENAS, ERIK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-09-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $81) SERVED JAN-07-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CARDENAS, ERIK
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALENTINO, VANESSA
